headlines.description: — The NBA returned to the Persian Gulf on Friday for the third consecutive year, and the preseason schedule for the 2023-24 season opened with the Boston Celtics beating the Denver Nuggets 107-103 in a matchup of the two most recent championship clubs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtics beat the Nuggets 107-103 in the NBA's preseason opener at Abu Dhabi

events.name: New Zealand Breakers at Utah Jazz
Minnesota Timberwolves at Los Angeles Lakers
